title: User Creation
summary: Create every user from the rep roster, place them in the right org node, send invitations, and confirm they can log in.
customerSummary: We create an account for everyone on your team and send them an invitation to log in.
overview:
With the org tree in place, create users so they land in the correct hierarchy. Users receive login credentials by email and **set their own password on first sign-in** at app.buildvision.io/login.

Create accounts, place each in the right office/line card, trigger invitations, and confirm at least the primary contact and one rep can actually log in. Role and permission detail is covered in the **Permissions** section.
prerequisites: Rep roster with intended permission level per person
tips: Match the number of users created to the **Active Users** count from intake.
Users set their own password on first login — you don't set passwords for them.
Spot-check a few users across different orgs rather than assuming placement is correct.
warnings: Verify invitations actually sent — watch for bounces or stuck sends before telling the client they're live.
commonMistakes: User count doesn't match Active Users from the contract.
Invitations show as sent but bounce, and no one notices until the client can't log in.
Placing a rep in the parent org instead of their specific office.

steps.title: Create all required users
steps.description: Create each user from the rep roster; match the Active Users count from intake.

steps.title: Send invitations / trigger credential emails
steps.description: Trigger the invitation / credential emails so users can set their password.
steps.verify: Send queue shows all delivered, no bounces.

callouts.text: The exact internal step that triggers the credential email is a known gap — see Process Gaps B-5.

steps.title: Place each user in the correct org node
steps.description: Assign each user to the correct office / line card / hierarchy node per the intake structure. (Role & permission level detail: see Permissions section.)

screenshots.caption: After first login, a user lands on their home page — notifications, projects, and the “Connect your email” prompt.
